metadata.description: Frontend specs for Jeju Air AI NOTAM Analysis System v2 — v1 base (38 specs) + 6 new specs for FR-020 TIFRS decision. 8 components marked v2_status:implemented for already-applied changes.
metadata.v2_delta_summary: Added: 3 hooks (useDecisions, useNotamDecision, useRecordDecision), 1 shared component (DecisionTypeBadge), 4 feature components (DecisionTable, DecisionSplitPanelDetail, NotamDecisionSection), 1 page (DecisionListPage). Updated: AppShell side nav, NotamDetailPage children, AuditLogTable action mapping. 8 components marked implemented.

hooks.name: useNotams
hooks.return_type: { data: { items: Notam[]; total: number; stats: NotamStats } | undefined; error: Error | undefined; isLoading: boolean; mutate: () => void }

hooks.name: useNotam
hooks.return_type: { data: Notam | undefined; error: Error | undefined; isLoading: boolean }

hooks.name: useNotamAnalysis
hooks.return_type: { trigger: (notamId: string) => Promise<{ importanceScore: number; importanceLevel: ImportanceLevel; aiSummary: string; aiAnalysis: string }>; isMutating: boolean }

hooks.name: useFlights
hooks.return_type: { data: { items: Flight[]; total: number } | undefined; error: Error | undefined; isLoading: boolean }

hooks.name: useFlight
hooks.return_type: { data: (Flight & { route: Route; affectedNotams: Notam[] }) | undefined; error: Error | undefined; isLoading: boolean }

hooks.name: useRoutes
hooks.return_type: { data: { items: Route[]; total: number } | undefined; error: Error | undefined; isLoading: boolean }

hooks.name: useRoute
hooks.return_type: { data: (Route & { impacts: NotamRouteImpact[]; activeNotams: Notam[] }) | undefined; error: Error | undefined; isLoading: boolean }

hooks.name: useRefBook
hooks.return_type: { data: { items: RefBookEntry[]; total: number } | undefined; error: Error | undefined; isLoading: boolean; mutate: () => void }

hooks.name: useBriefings
hooks.return_type: { data: { items: Briefing[]; total: number } | undefined; error: Error | undefined; isLoading: boolean; mutate: () => void }

hooks.name: useBriefing
hooks.return_type: { data: Briefing | undefined; error: Error | undefined; isLoading: boolean }

hooks.name: useDashboard
hooks.return_type: { data: { summary: DashboardSummary; routeImpacts: RouteImpactMapData[]; criticalNotams: Notam[] } | undefined; error: Error | undefined; isLoading: boolean }

hooks.name: useAuditLog
hooks.return_type: { data: { items: AuditLog[]; total: number } | undefined; error: Error | undefined; isLoading: boolean }

hooks.name: useGenerateBriefing
hooks.return_type: { trigger: (params: { flightId: string; type: BriefingType }) => Promise<Briefing>; isMutating: boolean }

hooks.name: useRouteAlternatives
hooks.return_type: { trigger: (notamId: string) => Promise<{ alternatives: RouteAlternative[]; reasoning: string }>; isMutating: boolean }

hooks.name: useDecisions
hooks.return_type: { data: { items: DecisionRecord[]; total: number } | undefined; error: Error | undefined; isLoading: boolean; mutate: () => void }

hooks.name: useNotamDecision
hooks.return_type: { data: DecisionRecord | undefined; error: Error | undefined; isLoading: boolean; mutate: () => void }
hooks.note: Conditional fetching — notamId가 없으면 요청하지 않음. 404 응답 시 data=undefined (에러가 아닌 빈 상태)

hooks.name: useRecordDecision
hooks.note: useSWRMutation 사용. 성공 시 useNotamDecision.mutate()와 useDecisions.mutate() 호출 필요.

contexts.name: NotificationContext
contexts.purpose: Flashbar 알림 메시지 관리 — AppLayout notifications 슬롯에 표시

contexts.name: AlertContext
contexts.purpose: Critical NOTAM 알림 배너 상태 관리 — 미확인 critical 알림 추적

contexts.name: AuthContext
contexts.purpose: Mock 인증 상태 관리 — 현재 로그인한 dispatcher 정보

layout.name: RootLayout
layout.description: Root layout with global styles, SWR config, context providers

layout.name: AppShell
layout.description: TopNavigation (AppLayout 외부) + AppLayout with SideNavigation, Breadcrumbs, Flashbar. v2: SideNavigation에 '의사결정 기록' 링크 추가.

side_navigation.v2_change: Added '의사결정 기록' (/decisions) link under 관리 section, above 감사 로그

shared.description: ImportanceLevel에 따라 색상 코딩된 Badge 컴포넌트. v2에서 색상 규칙 통일: red=critical, orange(red)=high, blue=medium/low/routine
NOTAM 만료까지 남은 시간 표시 — StatusIndicator 색상으로 긴급도 시각화
shared.logic: effectiveTo가 24시간 이내면 warning, 6시간 이내면 error, expired면 stopped, PERM이면 info

shared.description: ICAO 코드 + 한국어 공항명 Popover 표시
Leaflet 지도 래퍼 — dynamic import로 SSR 방지, Container 내부에 MapContainer 렌더링. v2: Leaflet CSS를 ES module import로 변경, position:relative wrapper div 추가.
shared.note: next/dynamic으로 lazy load. leaflet CSS는 ES module import (import 'leaflet/dist/leaflet.css'). L.Icon.Default.mergeOptions()로 marker icon 설정. wrapper div에 position:relative 필수.

shared.description: 에러 발생 시 Alert와 재시도 버튼 표시
DecisionType에 따라 색상 코딩된 Badge 컴포넌트. TIFRS 의사결정 유형 시각화.

behavior.mount: AlertContext에서 미확인 critical 알림 목록을 가져와 Flashbar items로 변환

v2_changes: Added map legend (red=critical, orange=high, blue=other, route line color)
NOTAM circles are clickable with popup (summary + link to /notams/{id})
Header info popover explaining map elements
Route dropdown includes '전체' (All) option as default
Map shows ALL NOTAMs for selected routes (not just critical)
Wrapper div with position:relative for Grid sizing

map_features.notam_circles: Circle with importance-based color: critical=#d13212, high=#ff9900, other=#0073bb. Clickable with Popup.
map_features.route_polylines: Polyline connecting waypoints. Default blue, selected thick.
map_features.intersection_highlight: Red polyline overlay on affected segments
map_features.legend: Map legend box showing color meanings

v2_changes: Now shows critical AND high importance NOTAMs (was critical-only)
NOTAM circle uses importance-based color coding consistent with dashboard map

specs.v2_notes: TIFRS decision recording form embedded in NOTAM detail page. Shows AI-suggested decision with editable TIFRS criteria fields. Supports record-decision action for audit trail.

form_fields.name: tifrsTime
form_fields.label: 시간 영향 (Time)
form_fields.description: NOTAM 유효 기간이 운항에 미치는 시간적 영향

form_fields.name: tifrsFacilities
form_fields.label: 시설 영향 (Facilities)
form_fields.description: 영향받는 공항 시설, 항행 장비 등

form_fields.name: tifrsRoute
form_fields.label: 항로 영향 (Route)
form_fields.description: 영향받는 항로 구간 및 대체 항로 가용성

form_fields.name: tifrsSchedule
form_fields.label: 스케줄 영향 (Schedule)
form_fields.description: 운항 스케줄 변경 필요성 및 범위

behavior.mount: useNotamDecision(notamId)로 기존 결정 로드. 있으면 읽기 전용 표시, 없으면 AI 사전 분석 결과로 폼 프리필
behavior.ai_prefill: AI가 제안한 TIFRS 값은 Alert type='info'로 상단에 표시. 운항관리사가 수정 가능
behavior.submit: useRecordDecision.trigger()로 POST. 성공 시 NotificationContext에 성공 알림 + useNotamDecision.mutate()
behavior.existing_decision: 이미 결정이 기록된 경우 KeyValuePairs로 읽기 전용 표시 + '수정' 버튼으로 편집 모드 전환
behavior.audit: 결정 기록 시 POST /api/audit-log (action: record-decision) 자동 호출

v2_changes: Status column header includes info popover explaining scheduled/dispatched/in-flight/arrived/cancelled/diverted status values
NOTAM circles use per-importance color coding (red=critical, orange=high, blue=other)
NOTAM circles are clickable with popup showing summary and link to detail page
Status column header includes info popover explaining active/suspended/alternate status values

props_interface.crewPackage: { dispComment: string; companyNotam: string; crewBriefing: string } | null

specs.v2_change: action 칼럼 한국어 매핑에 'record-decision=의사결정 기록' 추가

pages.v2_change: Added NotamDecisionSection child and FR-020 requirement

behavior.diff: notam.type === 'NOTAMR' && notam.replacesNotamId가 있으면 GET /api/notams/{id}/diff 호출하여 NotamDiffView 렌더링
behavior.decision: NotamDecisionSection에 notamId와 notam 전달 — TIFRS 의사결정 기록/조회

behavior.split_panel: DecisionTable에서 행 선택 시 DecisionSplitPanelDetail에 해당 DecisionRecord 표시. AppLayout splitPanel prop 사용.
behavior.load: useDecisions()로 전체 의사결정 기록 목록 로드
